# notificationIdentifier

**Instance Property**

An identifier for the notification.

## Declaration

```swift
var notificationIdentifier: String
```

## Discussion

This value corresponds to [doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/AccessoryNotification/Identifier-swift.struct/notificationIdentifier] on the accessory notification.

## Identifying the notification

- **sourceIdentifier**: A bundle identifier for the app that sent the notification.
